{"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT ACCOUNT_NAME, ACCOUNT_VALUE, ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE
FROM DFP_ITR_CVM
WHERE CNPJ = '02.998.611/0001-04'
  AND ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE IN ('2024-12-31','2024-09-30')
ORDER BY ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE, ACCOUNT_NAME;"}}
